ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the player is part of */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is part of */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "gm" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the game is part of */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "playoff_game" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is a playoff game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans in attendance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game identification number */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "field_goal_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the player */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles achieved by the player in the game */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles achieved by the player in the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's stats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season's stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored during the season */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected during the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made during the season */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares for the season */,
  "ws_per_48" REAL /* Win shares per 48 minutes */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value Over Replacement Player for the season */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Box Plus/Minus for the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in the season */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls by the player in the season */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Total technical fouls by the player in the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the season */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total offensive rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total defensive rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Total double-doubles achieved by the player in the season */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Total triple-doubles achieved by the player in the season */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the season stats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the awarded player */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., All-NBA, All-Star) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the award is part of */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the award entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points allowed against the team */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Overall seed for the playoffs */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team's games */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team stats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "tenure_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been with the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the coach is part of */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coach's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the highlight is from */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time in the game when the highlight occurred */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video highlight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the highlight entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans in attendance */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions during the game */,
  "fan_rating" INTEGER /* Fan rating for the game (1-10 scale) */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the game */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of tickets sold for the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fan engagement entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
